Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.Adaptation

Packages that use Adaptation
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.reactor
Project Reactor / RxJava 3 / Reactive-Streams Publisher adapters for the juneau-rest-server ReactiveStreamsAdapter SPI.

  • Uses of Adaptation in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive that return Adaptation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Adaptation
    ReactiveStreamsAdapter.adapt(Object value)
    Converts the supplied reactive value to a JDK-native Adaptation.
    static Adaptation
    Adaptation.single(CompletionStage<?> value)
    Creates a single-value adaptation backed by a CompletionStage.
    static Adaptation
    Adaptation.stream(Flow.Publisher<?> value)
    Creates a streaming adaptation backed by a Flow.Publisher.
